title: Energinet's Market Dialogue on Hydrogen Infrastructure has been Completed and the Timetable has been Updated
content: Energinet's market dialogue on hydrogen infrastructure from spring 2024 has confirmed a large potential for the transport need for hydrogen in the Danish market of up to 6.9 GW in 2050. According to the political agreement from April and on the basis of the held market dialogue, the booking requirement for the project has been updated and divided geographically. Furthermore, the timetable has been updated. However, the entries come from projects with significantly different degrees of maturity, and Energinet thus assesses that immediately is a transportation need with high maturity of approx. 0.8 GW in the impact year 2031.
author: Analysts Account
